name: compat-test-skill
author: octos-harness-compat
description: Summarize a text file into a compact report artifact (third-party compatibility fixture)

tools.name: summarize_text
tools.description: Read a text file and write a compact summary. Returns the summary file as a deliverable artifact.

input_path.description: Absolute path of the source text file.

output_path.description: Absolute path where the summary file will be written.
